description_long: This is a large, two-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features horizontal siding in a muted gray-blue color, complemented by large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The front facade includes a double garage, a paved driveway, and a landscaped entryway with shrubs and a walkway leading to the main door. The rear of the house opens to a private patio area, partially enclosed by fencing and surrounded by mature trees. The roofline is mostly flat with some raised sections, and the house is set within a landscaped lot with greenery on all sides. The overall appearance is contemporary, with an emphasis on open spaces and natural light.
description: A spacious, modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a double garage, surrounded by landscaped greenery. The design features clean lines, asymmetrical window placement, and a mix of paved and planted outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal siding, large windows, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private patio, fenced backyard, and multiple windows on both stories.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible raised roof sections, side entry, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, paved steps, landscaped approach, and no porch or columns.
